matcher_value: if (Get-Command Get-MPIOSetting -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Get-MPIOSetting | Select-Object PathVerificationState,PathVerificationPeriod,RetryCount,RetryInterval,DiskTimeoutValue,@{N='LoadBalancePolicy';E={Get-MSDSMGlobalDefaultLoadBalancePolicy 2>$null}} | Format-List; mpclaim.exe -s -d } else { 'MPIO 미설치 또는 미지원' }
